positive: A vibrant, aesthetically pleasing illustration of a mountain scene with stylized geometric flora and fauna. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centered, featuring a strong silhouette of stylized mountains under a gradient sunset sky (deep indigo transitioning to warm coral). Incorporate abstract elements like flowing lines, scattered geometric patterns, and stylized constellations. The overall style must be minimalist graphic design, utilizing clean, solid color blocks and linework, reminiscent of retro travel posters but modernized. Perfect for printing on t-shirts or tote bags. Vector art aesthetic, flat color palette, high contrast, detailed lines, clean edges, central subject focus, vibrant colors.
negative: blur, artifact, watermark, text, logo, signature, messy, grain, noise, multiple people, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, photographic, realistic, gradient sky (avoiding photorealism), muted colors
